dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'positive price momentum' as price above sma_50 and positive returns. 'Bull run condition' mapped to TRENDING_UP regime. Exit triggers when momentum reverses (price crosses below sma_50). Strategy explicitly avoids short selling per source text. Stop loss and hold period set conservatively for momentum strategy.

backtest_rule.reason: Interpreted 'positive price momentum' as price above sma_50 and positive returns. 'Bull run condition' mapped to TRENDING_UP regime. Exit triggers when momentum reverses (price crosses below sma_50). Strategy explicitly avoids short selling per source text. Stop loss and hold period set conservatively for momentum strategy.

source_rule_text: During bull markets, go long winner stocks via momentum strategy; avoid short selling loser stocks
